rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators and implication for contract expressions
Place component type contracts in component type scopes only
Generate valid AGREE annex blocks with proper syntax and structure
generic_rules: Ensure all identifiers in AGREE contracts are visible in the current component scope
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type-level guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Branching logic in AGREE uses nested `if ... then ... else` expressions
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
